articles.title: Fil-Am lawyers move to raise legacy of forgotten labor leader in Hawaii
articles.description: HONOLULU — Decades before Filipino-American agricultural workers organized a historic strike in California, Pablo Manlapit was already organizing Filipino laborers in Hawaii.
